Faqir Ali

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Calligraphy from a Ghazal of Badr al-Din Hilali Jaghata’i (Persian, active c. 1500)
by Faqir Ali
Iran, Safavid period (1501–1722) · c. 1550; borders added c. 1700s and mounted upside down · ink on paper (verso)
←Turner, Alfred Mir Sayyid Ali→
